scenario.name: notion-frontend-reinspect
scenario.description: Notion AI 통신 메커니즘 재조사. 이전: WebSocket 전용. HTTP 기반 API가 있는지 재확인.

steps.action: Open Chrome DevTools Network tab, enable Preserve log. Navigate to https://www.notion.so. Open any page with Notion AI available.
Clear Network tab. Trigger Notion AI: press Space for AI, type 'Hello, summarize this page' and press Enter. Wait 15 seconds.

Check Network tab for ALL request types: Fetch/XHR, WS, EventSource. For each POST/PUT request after AI trigger, record: URL, Content-Type, status, body preview. Especially look for any non-WebSocket request that contains the AI prompt.
Filter Network by 'WS'. Click on WebSocket connection. Check Messages tab. Look for messages containing the AI prompt text. Record the message format.

expected_output.http_ai_endpoint: URL if any HTTP endpoint carries AI prompts
expected_output.ws_message_format: JSON structure of AI prompt messages
expected_output.block_feasibility: Can Etap intercept the AI communication?

notes: 이전 BLOCKED_ONLY 사유: WebSocket 전용 통신. HTTP 응답 주입 불가. 혹시 HTTP fallback이나 새 엔드포인트가 있는지 재확인.
